name: Beacon Minerals Limited
analysis: BCN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 46% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.5500, stop A$1.8661, target A$3.0600 (0.75:1) — then trail it.
